name: unleashedservices-unleashed-mail-plugin
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the unleashed-mail Claude Code plugin (multi-agent development plugin for UnleashedMail, a native macOS 15+ email client supporting Gmail and Microsoft Graph).

plugins.name: unleashed-mail
plugins.description: Multi-agent development plugin for UnleashedMail — a native macOS 15+ email client supporting Gmail and Microsoft Graph, built with Swift 6, SwiftUI, AppKit, WKWebView, GRDB.swift (SQLCipher), and MVVM architecture. Ships 21 specialized agents, 21 skills (18 auto-triggering + 3 invoke-only orchestration workflows), and a bundled deterministic review-synthesizer MCP server. Aligns agents with project's path-scoped rules (`.claude/rules/`) and defines cross-agent workflow contracts (AGENT_CONTRACTS.md).
